methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series E → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.4x) to $315M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Climate & Energy (found 0 same-stage, 2 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 21 same-sector peers exist in Climate & Energy, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Climate & Bio-Manufacturing

data.narrative:
Sunfire, a Series E climate and energy technology company founded by Nils Aldag, has raised $315M+ to date. The valuation analysis draws on a peer universe of 9 companies across climate and energy (1 public, 8 private), including adjacent-stage comparables such as TAE Technologies, Redwood Materials, Helion, Commonwealth Fusion Systems, and QuantumScape.

A peer-median approach proved inapplicable due to insufficient same-stage comparable data; the climate and energy sector contains only 21 total peers, and filtering for same-stage or adjacent-stage companies with similar valuation tiers yielded fewer than three datapoints. Consequently, the valuation relies on stage-progression methodology, which applies a 1.4x step-up multiplier typical of Series E advancement to the $315M raised proxy, yielding an implied valuation of $441M.

The triangulated range is $375M to $507M, with a median of $441M. This single-method result carries material uncertainty. The absence of narrow peer comparables in Sunfire's specific domain limits benchmarking rigor and leaves valuation sensitive to both the assumed step-up multiplier and the timing of capital deployment relative to operational milestones. Investors should recognize that this range reflects stage-based progression rather than market-comparable validation, and further diligence on comparable financing activity or revenue multiples in frontier energy would strengthen conviction.
